title: betonica alopecuros subsp. divulsa
intro: Bentonica alopecuros subsp. divulsa, also known as wood betony, is a subspecies of the betonica alopecuros plant, a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of wood betony include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain relief and improved circulation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress and muscle tension. Wood betony can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
